pains.summary: Sonatype's COO is a finance guy who doesn't understand ABM complexity, requiring dumbed-down explanations
pains.quote: I'm really struggling with how to dumb down the complex ABM stuff
pains.speaker: Sara Pilling

pains.summary: Data overload in MMX model making it hard to draw conclusions
pains.quote: These like it is hard to draw any conclusions because there's so much data here. So like we almost need the ability Like I almost need like a pie chart for just a quarter or just a year like Or I just need to look at one year and aggregate.
pains.speaker: Sara Pilling

tools_switched_from.reason: Moved to Marketo for better multi-domain handling and web measurement
tools_switched_from.quote: pages used to flow into HubSpot before and they've off-boarded HubSpot
tools_switched_from.speaker: Ram Arunachalam

political_tussles.summary: Marketing leader struggling to explain ABM value to finance-focused COO
political_tussles.quote: our chief operating officer is a finance guy. I'm really struggling with how to dumb down the complex ABM stuff
political_tussles.speaker: Sara Pilling

political_tussles.summary: Client questioning whether RevSure subscription pricing is justified given marginal optimization gains
political_tussles.quote: i think the reason why we backed off of the subscription is that pricing is upside down because this is basically saying if i spend a little more and then tweak it i'm going to basically get the same or a little more
political_tussles.speaker: Sara Pilling

contrarians.claim: Google spend should be cut from $370K to ~$90K per quarter despite being a major channel
contrarians.why_unusual: Typically vendors recommend increasing spend on largest channels; suggesting 75% cut on Google is radical
contrarians.quote: my Google spend should be $90,000 a quarter. Okay, something like that.
contrarians.speaker: Sara Pilling

contrarians.claim: ROI going down while spend goes up can be acceptable if optimizing for pipeline volume
contrarians.why_unusual: Most finance executives would reject ROI degradation; RevSure team frames this as acceptable trade-off
contrarians.quote: coming down because, you know, the spend has gone up by 18 percent. The pipeline has gone up only by 10 percent.
contrarians.speaker: Ram Arunachalam

contrarians.claim: Display/ABM attribution gets 'so big' at account level that it tells a story by itself
contrarians.why_unusual: Usually display is criticized for weak attribution; Sara sees inflated account-level attribution as validating targeting strategy
contrarians.quote: if you look at display performance at the account level, those, that attribution gets so big. I think that sort of tells that story too. Like by targeting the accounts, we are finding the right ones.
contrarians.speaker: Sara Pilling

revsure_problems.problem: UI lag and slow performance causing user frustration and session abandonment
revsure_problems.quote: Like am I the only one that has these like lagging issues or is it like a yeah?
revsure_problems.speaker: Sara Pilling

revsure_problems.problem: Response curves showing incorrect current spend values for Reddit and other channels
revsure_problems.quote: when I go into reddit, the current spent number disappears. Okay, so that is one problem. I don't know if this is like a UI issue
revsure_problems.speaker: Ram Arunachalam

revsure_problems.problem: Response curves showing free-falling curves that theoretically shouldn't happen
revsure_problems.quote: It cannot Theoretically, it cannot be like this free-falling curve, right? I mean, this is happening for all the channels here in Sonotype.
revsure_problems.speaker: Ram Arunachalam

revsure_problems.problem: Scenario planner showing zero pipeline for high-spend channels like Events and Google
revsure_problems.quote: event and Google are the two highest spending channels I get zero here
revsure_problems.speaker: Ram Arunachalam

revsure_problems.problem: ABM and Reddit spend not showing correctly in UI despite being in model
revsure_problems.quote: ABM should show up, mind it, ask them to check it, haven't seen it
revsure_problems.speaker: Ram Arunachalam

revsure_problems.problem: Data science team not checking if outputs make sense before showing to customers
revsure_problems.quote: you guys Just stop at some data science work and don't really pay attention to what is really being shown to the customer
revsure_problems.speaker: Deepinder Singh Dhingra

revsure_problems.problem: Client needs hover-over explanations to understand different attribution methodologies
revsure_problems.quote: That's helpful, but I need to be able to hover over something and know that. Break down your pipeline and maybe it's there.
revsure_problems.speaker: Sara Pilling

best_about_revsure.summary: Mass filter application is helpful for reducing repetitive filter setting
best_about_revsure.speaker: Sara Pilling

immediate.win: Mass filter application feature rolled out for top-level filters
immediate.quote: we rolled out the ability to mass apply filters. So if you, you see where it says here, apply. So if you click on the laptop, just apply it here. But if you click on, yeah, click on the arrow, you can apply it to just the widget, all widgets across all tabs
immediate.speaker: Francisco Oller Garcia

immediate.win: Channel classification fixes showing correct channels and dollar numbers
immediate.quote: we are able to see like the correct channels that are showing up here and the dollar numbers associated with it. For example, Reddit is broken out
immediate.speaker: Ram Arunachalam

long_term.win: Campaign reallocation capability to optimize spend across all channels
long_term.quote: we could do a campaign reallocation um which we have not I have not waited it in the team um but uh you know I could potentially show that to you also
long_term.speaker: Ram Arunachalam

before_state.pain_summary: Marketing struggling to prove ABM value to finance-focused leadership, with unclear channel attribution and no systematic way to optimize spend allocation

after_state.with_revsure: Using MMX model to identify overspending on Google and reallocate to LinkedIn/Reddit, but frustrated by UI bugs and questioning subscription value
open_issues: Response curve accuracy for all channels
Scenario planner showing zeros for high-spend channels
